summary: Verified 'No Stories Found' bug fix - all tests pass. Onboarding flow works end-to-end (Skip intro -> Select categories -> Accept GDPR -> Navigate to home). News articles load correctly on home screen. Category filter pills work (For You, Politics, Business, Technology). Article cards display all required elements: hero image, source badge, category badge, title, description, timestamp, read more link.

issues: Category pills header area has light background - could match dark theme better

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: 'No Stories Found' no longer appears when categories are selected
useNews hook category change detection is working correctly
Initial fetch on home.tsx properly triggers when preferences are loaded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for 'No Stories Found' verified working. Onboarding flow, category selection, GDPR acceptance, and news loading all work correctly. Category filter pills (For You, Politics, Business, Technology) properly filter articles.

onboarding_flow.gdpr_checkbox: Working - checkbox with Terms & Privacy Policy link

home_screen.no_stories_found_bug: FIXED - no longer appears when categories selected
home_screen.category_pills: Working - For You, Politics, Business, Technology tabs
home_screen.category_filtering: Working - clicking pills filters articles correctly

article_card_display.source_badge: Working - NY TIMES BUSINESS, NPR POLITICS, etc.
article_card_display.title: Working - headline with serif font
article_card_display.bookmark_share_icons: Working - icons visible in top right

verified_features.tab_bar: Working - Home, For You, Search, Saved, Settings

Fixed home.tsx initial fetch logic with proper preferencesLoaded check
